name: skyphusion-llm-public
description: Multimodal AI on Cloudflare Workers: chat (35 models across 5 providers), image / TTS / STT / video / music generation, RAG over files of any type, multi-turn conversations, behind Cloudflare Access.
author: Conrad Rockenhaus

scripts.bootstrap: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('wrangler.toml')){console.error('wrangler.toml already exists; not overwriting.');process.exit(1)}fs.copyFileSync('wrangler.example.toml','wrangler.toml');console.log('Created wrangler.toml from wrangler.example.toml. Fill in database_id (and worker name if you want a custom one) before deploying.')"
